name: Circular Contouring Accuracy Profiling
description:
A robotics engineer must profile the dynamic path-tracking accuracy of a robot arm in CoppeliaSim. Program the robot arm to trace a circular path in the horizontal (XY) plane at three progressively faster speeds (e.g., 10s, 5s, 2s durations) using inverse kinematics or Jacobian-based control. Record the actual end-effector position at each simulation step, compute the radial error from the ideal circle, and produce a profiling report demonstrating that tracking error increases with speed due to physical joint limits (corner cutting/physics lag). 

Save results under /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/ as:
1. contouring_data.csv (columns: speed_profile_id, sim_time_s, target_x, target_y, actual_x, actual_y, radial_error_mm)
2. contouring_report.json (fields: total_runs, speeds_tested, max_error_slowest_run_mm, max_error_fastest_run_mm, physics_lag_detected)

Login: username=ga, password=password123.
